info.name: MediMind Agent API v2.0
info.description:
MediMind Agent API Postman Collection v2.0

## Features
- Automatic variable extraction (IDs saved automatically)
- Built-in test scripts for response validation
- Document upload and processing workflow
- Chat modes: chat, ask, explain, conclude
- Context support (selected_text + document_id)
- Streaming (SSE) endpoints

## Usage
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Run requests in order:
   - Health -> Notebooks -> Documents -> Sessions -> Chat
3. For document upload: select a file in the request body
4. Poll document status until 'completed' before chat
5. Variables are automatically populated

## Chat Context Format
For explain/conclude modes with selected text:
```json
{
  "context": {
    "document_id": "<uuid>",
    "selected_text": "text from document"
  }
}
```

## Documentation
See POSTMAN_GUIDE.md for detailed instructions.

item.description: Health check endpoints to verify API and dependency status

request.description: Basic health check endpoint. Returns 200 if service is running.
Readiness check. Verifies database and other dependencies are ready.
Liveness check. Verifies the process is alive and responding.
Get system information including version and supported features.

item.name: Chat
item.description: Chat functionality with support for multiple modes and streaming.

request.description: Send a chat message in non-streaming mode. Supports modes: chat, ask, explain, conclude.
Ask mode (ReAct + hybrid RAG).
Explain mode with selected_text + document_id (uses hybrid RAG).
Conclude mode with selected_text + document_id.

exec: console.log("Streaming response received. Check response body for SSE events.");

request.description: Send a chat message in streaming mode (Server-Sent Events). Response is delivered incrementally.
Explain mode streaming with selected_text + document_id.
Conclude mode streaming with selected_text + document_id.
Cancel an ongoing streaming response.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin utilities: reprocess pending docs, reindex single doc, index stats.

request.description: Trigger processing of all pending documents.
Rebuild indexes (pgvector + ES) for a single document.
View document counts by status and basic index stats.
